The Spokesman-Review- party
has overreached itself. 1t will not
get the preachers or the solid church
vote, which 1t has been claiming.


There are voters in the church ele-
ment who refuse to be hoodwinked by
the wholesale pledges made.


They know that Acuff Is a tool of
the Spokesman Review and the
Washington Water Power company.


THEY KNOW THAT ACuFF
OBEYED THE ORDERS OF THE
WASHINGTON WATER POWER
COMPANY AND VOTED FOR A SA-
LOON LICENSE PERMITTING
WHISKY AND BEER TO BE SOLD
AT NATATORIUM PARK ON SUM-
DAY!


That kind OF man is unsafe.


The man who will boast of his pro-
hibition principles and of the fact
that he voted against saloon licenses
in general as a prohibitionist--


And then turn like a whipped cur
to obey the orders of the Washington
Water Power company and cast the
deciding vote which gave a barroom
license to park


Is not a safe man to place in power.


He Is a RENEGADE PROHIBI-
ZIONIST?


What do YOU think of a man who
will violate his boosted principles
merely to obey the order of cor
rupting corporation? What do you
think he will do when it comes to
giving away franchises.


In that same city council. ]. A.
Schiller sat as councilman. Mr..
Schiller is manager for ID. Holman
& Co. He is in the whisky business.


Yet as a whisky man, Mr.. Schiller
voted against that license to sell
beer and whisky at a resort fire.
Quented by innocent women and chill
dren. He could not bring himself to
sanction such methods of moneymak
Ing.


1t took renegade prohibitionist
scorned to do!


This renegade prohbitionist-thi
avowed enemy of organized labor
this original advocate of water
metrs-


is THE MAN THE TALL TOWER
ASKS YOU TO VOTE INTO POWER.


He Is the man who tells the
preachers that he will "close up the
town


lie is the man who tells the water
meter gang that he will force in
water meters


He is the man who declares city
